message:
✨ Lock demo mode on Netlify deploys and show install guide on exit attempt

On Netlify deployments (console.kubestellar.io), demo mode cannot be
toggled off. Attempting to exit demo mode via the banner X button or the
agent status toggle now opens the Install KubeStellar Console modal
instead. The "Exit Demo" button in the install modal footer is also
hidden when demo mode is forced.

- Export isDemoModeForced from useDemoMode.ts
- Export InstallModal from DemoInstallGuide.tsx
- Guard toggle in Layout.tsx, AgentStatusIndicator.tsx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
